description: Sidebar, chat view, @mention autocomplete, and attachment banners

userStories.title: .1: Sidebar Project List
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a list of my projects in the sidebar so that I can access them easily.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar shows projects for logged-in user

userStories.title: .2: Project Creation UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create a new project from the sidebar so that I can organize my threads.
acceptanceCriteria: Add "+ New Project" button to sidebar
Implement modal/inline form for project name input
Write E2E test for project creation flow
Users can create projects with 2 clicks
New project appears in sidebar immediately (real-time update)

userStories.title: .3: Thread Management UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create threads within projects and rename/delete threads.
acceptanceCriteria: Add confirmation dialog for destructive actions
Users can create threads in projects with 1 click

userStories.title: .4: Sidebar Virtualization
userStories.description: As a user with 100+ projects, I want the sidebar to remain performant.

userStories.title: .1: Chat Header with Project Context
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see which project (if any) the current thread belongs to.
acceptanceCriteria: Display project name if `thread.projectId` is set
Make project name clickable (navigate to project in sidebar)
Chat header shows project name for project threads
Chat header shows "Free Chat" for free threads
UI is visually distinct for project vs. free chats

userStories.title: .2: Attachment Banner UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a banner prompting me to attach the thread to a project after I mention it.
acceptanceCriteria: Display banner after AI response if:
Thread is not attached to that project
Banner was not dismissed for this mention
Write E2E test for attachment flow
Banner appears immediately after AI response to @mention
"Attach" button attaches thread and closes banner
Dismissed banners do not reappear for same mention

userStories.title: .3: @Mention Autocomplete
userStories.description: As a user, I want autocomplete suggestions when I type @ so that I can easily mention projects.
acceptanceCriteria: Display autocomplete menu with project list
Insert selected project name on selection
Handle edge cases (no matching projects, archived projects)
Selected project name inserted with space after

userStories.title: .4: Message Context Indicator
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see which project context was active when a message was sent (for debugging).
acceptanceCriteria: Display small badge on messages that used project context
Badge shows project name on hover
Badge appears on messages with project context
Badge does not clutter message UI
